title: MikroTik CME Gateway
description: The CME Gateway is a rugged and affordable CAT-M LTE modem designed for connecting sensors and IoT devices to the mobile network. The modem provide LTE Cat NB2 and LTE Cat M1 extremely efficient, low-cost, low-bandwidth mobile internet connectivity. The modem is equipped with 2x ETH ports (1x POE-In and 1x POE-OUT), 2.4GHz WiFi , and GPS . Thanks to rugged construction, IP66 protection and the option to power the device via a terminal block, the modem can operate variety of harsh environments… 2x ETH ports 2.4GHz WiFi extremely efficient, low-cost, low-bandwidth connection with LTE Cat NB2 and LTE Cat M1 Integrated GPS Flexible power options: POE-IN, POE-OUT, DC terminal block Rugged construction with IP66 rating Device PoE injector Power adapter 48V/0.95A Metal strap
